## Tech Stack Changes

| Dependency | Before | After | Reason |
| ---------- | ------ | ----- | ------ |
| Java (pom property) | 23 | 25 | User requested latest LTS runtime |
| Maven execution toolchain | 3.9.14 | 4.0.0-rc-5 | Java 25 compatibility validation during upgrade |
| PostgreSQL JDBC | 42.7.5 | 42.7.10 | Follow-up CVE remediation |
| Flyway migration SQL type | TIMESTAMPTZ | TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE | Ensure PostgreSQL + H2 compatibility for test/runtime validation |

## Challenges

- **Maven 4 installer gap**
  - **Issue**: Built-in Maven installer returned 3.9.14 instead of 4.x.
  - **Resolution**: Installed Maven 4.0.0-rc-5 manually from Apache archive and validated with Java 25.

- **Pre-existing test failure blocked final gate**
  - **Issue**: Flyway migration failed on H2 due to TIMESTAMPTZ data type.
  - **Resolution**: Replaced TIMESTAMPTZ with TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE in migration SQL; tests then passed 1/1.

## Limitations

None.
